title: View My Campaigns
postconditions: GM is viewing a list of their owned campaigns
trigger: GM logs in or navigates to the Campaign Dashboard

main_scenario.action: GM navigates to the Campaign Dashboard
System retrieves the list of campaigns owned by the GM
System displays the campaigns in a list format, including Name, Description, Party Size, and Party Level

exceptions.condition: No campaigns exist for the GM
exceptions.action: System displays an empty state message prompting the GM to create a new campaign

acceptance_criteria: Only campaigns owned by the logged-in GM are displayed.
